ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the project */,
  "text" TEXT /* Project summary */,
  "id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "project_number" TEXT /* Project number */,
  "terms" TEXT /* Terms associated with the project */,
  "administration" INTEGER /* Administration type */,
  "organization" INTEGER /* Organization responsible for the project */,
  "mechanism" INTEGER /* Mechanism of funding */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the project was funded */,
  "award_amount" INTEGER /* Award amount for the project */,
  "cong_dist" TEXT /* Congressional district */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the project started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the project is expected to end */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "pi_id" INTEGER /* Principal Investigator ID */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the project data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the project data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_organization FOREIGN KEY ("organization") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_pi_id FOREIGN KEY ("pi_id") REFERENCES principal_investigators ("pi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_mechanism FOREIGN KEY ("mechanism") REFERENCES mechanisms ("mech_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_administration FOREIGN KEY ("administration") REFERENCES administrations ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "org_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the organization */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the organization's website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contact */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administrations" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administration type */,
  "admin_type" TEXT /* Type of administration (e.g., NLM, NHLBI, NICHD, NIA) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mechanisms" (
  "mech_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding mechanism */,
  "mech_type" TEXT /* Type of funding mechanism (e.g., R01, K01) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mech_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "terms" (
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each term */,
  "term_name" TEXT /* Name of the term (e.g., Adoption, Adult, Algorithm) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_terms" (
  "proj_term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-term relationship */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proj_term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_terms_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES terms ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_terms_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator, grant manager) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the user is affiliated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the project */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "principal_investigators" (
  "pi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each principal investigator */,
  "pi_name" TEXT /* Full name of the principal investigator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the principal investigator */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the principal investigator */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the principal investigator is affiliated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_principal_investigators_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the institution */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contact */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)
